compiled_state.title: Sprint workflow skips completion-verifier sub-agent for story closure
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

The /dso:sprint workflow fails to dispatch the `dso:completion-verifier` sub-agent to verify story completion before closing a story (Step 10a per CLAUDE.md rule 24). The orchestrator closes stories without independent verification, relying on its own assessment instead.

CLAUDE.md rule 24 states: 'Never skip dso:completion-verifier dispatch or substitute inline verification — the orchestrator MUST dispatch the verifier sub-agent at story closure (Step 10a) and epic closure (Phase 7 Step 0.75). Inline verification is NOT a substitute.'

## Impact

Stories may be closed without meeting their done definitions, since the orchestrator is biased toward confirming its own work.

## Expected Behavior

The sprint orchestrator dispatches `dso:completion-verifier` (sonnet) at story closure Step 10a and at epic closure Phase 7 Step 0.75, and blocks closure if the verifier reports unmet criteria.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Behavioral assertion (Step 5 LLM exemption): After fix, sprint SKILL.md Step 10a completion-verifier dispatch MUST be positioned BEFORE the control flow warning, not after. Or Step 10 must include explicit cross-reference to Step 10a.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
